title: hebe × kirkii
intro: Hebe × kirkii, also known as the Tī Kōuka, is a hybrid plant species from the Hebe genus, native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hebe × kirkii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Hebe × kirkii is typically prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment, and its herbal preparations can be used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
